name: agent-governance-starter
description: Governance bootstrap generator for agent-native projects.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/init.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-starter.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-project.mjs && node --check scripts/lint-template-tables.mjs && node --check scripts/check-antigravity-skills.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-base.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-fullstack.mjs && node --check scripts/fixtures-check.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-runtime-proof.mjs && node --check scripts/assert-claude-first-response.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime-smoke-codex.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime-smoke-claude.mjs && node --check scripts/runtime-smoke-antigravity.mjs
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-starter.mjs . && node scripts/lint-template-tables.mjs && node scripts/check-antigravity-skills.mjs
scripts.runtime:proof: npm run validate:runtime-proof && npm run runtime:proof:codex && npm run runtime:proof:claude && npm run runtime:proof:antigravity
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run validate && npm run validate:runtime-proof && npm run smoke:base && npm run smoke:fullstack && npm run validate:project && npm run fixtures
